query:
ALTER TABLE `01_colaboradores`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `setor` VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avatar` VARCHAR(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
